interfaces.name: IArchetypes
interfaces.description: List and inspect archetypes (roles) in a space. Permissions are hidden unless the bot has ManageArchetype entitlement.

routes.description: Gets a single archetype by ID. Pass spaceId and archetypeId as query parameters.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.
Archetype not found.

routes.description: Lists all archetypes in a space. Returns id, name, colour, isMentionable, isDefault. Permissions are included only if the bot has the ManageArchetype entitlement.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Lists all members assigned to a specific archetype. Pass spaceId and archetypeId as query parameters.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: IBotSelf
interfaces.description: Get information about the authenticated bot and its spaces.

routes.description: Returns the bot's own profile: user ID, username, display name, avatar, and email.
Lists all spaces the bot has been added to.

interfaces.name: ICalls
interfaces.description: Receive and manage incoming calls. Verified bots only.

routes.description: Accepts an incoming call. Returns a LiveKit room token for joining the call audio. The bot must be the callee.

errors.description: Failed to accept call.
Call is not in ringing state.
This call is not directed at this bot.
This endpoint requires a verified bot.

routes.description: Rejects an incoming call with an optional reason.

errors.description: This call is not directed at this bot.
This endpoint requires a verified bot.

routes.description: Lists all currently ringing calls for the bot.

errors.description: This endpoint requires a verified bot.

routes.description: Subscribes to the caller's audio track in an active call. Returns a token and WebSocket URL for receiving Opus audio frames. The caller may take a few seconds to connect after the call is accepted — retry or delay the subscription.

errors.description: Call is not in accepted state.
This call is not directed at this bot.
This endpoint requires a verified bot.

interfaces.name: IChannels
interfaces.description: Create, list, and delete channels within a space.

routes.description: Creates a new channel in a space. Specify name, type (text or voice), and optionally a channel group.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Deletes a channel. Pass spaceId and channelId as query parameters.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Lists all channels in a space. Pass spaceId as a query parameter.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: ICommands
interfaces.description: Register, update, list, and delete slash commands for your bot.

routes.description: Deletes a slash command by its commandId (query parameter).

errors.description: Command does not exist or is not owned by this bot.

routes.description: Lists all commands registered by this bot across all scopes.
Lists commands available in a specific space (global + space-scoped). Pass spaceId as a query parameter.
Registers a new slash command. Commands can be global or scoped to a specific space. Max 50 commands per scope.

errors.description: Maximum 50 commands per scope.
Description must be max 100 characters.
Name must be 1-32 lowercase alphanumeric characters.

routes.description: Updates an existing slash command's description, options, or default permission.

errors.description: Command does not exist or is not owned by this bot.

interfaces.name: IEvents
interfaces.description: Subscribe to real-time events via Server-Sent Events (SSE). Receive messages, member changes, voice activity, and more.

routes.description: Opens a persistent SSE connection. Pass intents as a bitmask to filter events. Supports reconnection via Last-Event-ID header or lastEventId query parameter.

errors.description: No valid intents specified.

interfaces.name: IInteractions
interfaces.description: Respond to slash-command, control, and select interactions. Supports ack, defer, modal, reply, and edit.

routes.description: Acknowledge an interaction. The client shows a brief confirmation.

errors.description: Interaction does not exist or has expired.

routes.description: Defer an interaction. The client shows a loading state until the bot follows up.

errors.description: Interaction does not exist or has expired.

routes.description: Edit the text or controls of a message previously sent by this bot.

errors.description: Message does not exist or was not sent by this bot.

routes.description: Show a modal dialog to the user who triggered the interaction.

errors.description: Modal definition is invalid.
Interaction does not exist or has expired.

routes.description: Reply to an interaction by sending a message to the channel. Optionally reply to a specific message via replyTo.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: IMembers
interfaces.description: Manage space members: kick users from channels.

routes.description: Kicks a user from a channel. Pass spaceId, channelId, and userId as query parameters.

errors.description: Failed to kick user — they may not be in the channel.
Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: IMessages
interfaces.description: Send messages and retrieve message history from channels.

routes.description: Gets message history for a channel. Pass channelId as a query parameter. Supports pagination via from (message ID) and limit (1–100, default 50).

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Sends a text message to a channel. Include a unique randomId for deduplication. Optionally reply to another message via replyTo.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: ISpaces
interfaces.description: Get space details and member information.

routes.description: Gets space details — name, description, and community flag. Pass spaceId as a query parameter.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Gets a single member's details. Pass spaceId and userId as query parameters.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Lists all members of a space with their username, display name, and roles. Pass spaceId as a query parameter. Requires privileged intent.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: ITyping
interfaces.description: Send typing indicators to channels. Typing status automatically expires after 8 seconds.

routes.description: Triggers a typing indicator in a channel. The indicator auto-expires after 8 seconds. Call repeatedly to keep it active. Supported kinds: typing, thinking, uploading, searching.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

routes.description: Explicitly stops the typing indicator in a channel. Optional — the indicator expires automatically after 8 seconds.

errors.description: Bot is not a member of this space.

interfaces.name: IVoice
interfaces.description: Get voice streaming tokens for audio ingress. Bots stream Opus audio directly to a WebSocket endpoint — no WebRTC needed.

routes.description: Gets a LiveKit JWT token and WebSocket ingress URL for streaming audio into a voice channel. The bot must be a member of the space, and the channel must be a voice channel.

errors.description: Channel is not a voice channel.
Bot is not a member of this space.
Channel does not exist in this space.

interfaces.name: IVoiceEgress
interfaces.description: Subscribe to individual voice tracks for audio egress. Verified bots only.

routes.description: Subscribes to a user's audio track in a voice channel. Returns a LiveKit token and WebSocket URL for receiving the audio stream. The bot must be a verified bot and a member of the space.

errors.description: Channel is not a voice channel.
Bot is not a member of this space.
This endpoint requires a verified bot.
Channel does not exist in this space.

routes.description: Unsubscribes from a previously subscribed audio track.

errors.description: This endpoint requires a verified bot.

events.name: ArchetypeCreate
events.description: A new archetype (role) was created in a space.

events.name: ArchetypeUpdate
events.description: An archetype (role) was updated in a space.

events.name: BotInstallingToSpace
events.description: Sent directly to the bot when a server administrator installs it into a space. Always delivered regardless of intents.

events.name: BotUninstallingFromSpace
events.description: Sent directly to the bot when a server administrator uninstalls it from a space. Always delivered regardless of intents.

events.name: CallEnded
events.description: A call the bot was involved in has ended.

events.name: CallIncoming
events.description: An incoming call is ringing for the bot.

events.name: ChannelCreate
events.description: A new channel was created in a space.

events.name: ChannelDelete
events.description: A channel was deleted from a space.

events.name: CommandInteraction
events.description: A user invoked a slash command registered by the bot.

events.name: ControlInteraction
events.description: A user clicked an interactive button on a message.

events.name: Heartbeat
events.description: Keep-alive ping sent every 30 seconds. Contains cursor for reconnection.

events.name: MemberJoin
events.description: A user joined a space the bot is in.

events.name: MemberLeave
events.description: A user left or was removed from a space the bot is in.

events.name: MemberUpdate
events.description: A member's profile or roles were updated in a space.

events.name: MessageCreate
events.description: A new message was sent in a channel the bot has access to.

events.name: MessageEdit
events.description: A message was edited in a channel the bot has access to.

events.name: ModalSubmit
events.description: A user submitted a modal popup form.

events.name: PresenceUpdate
events.description: A user's online status or activity changed.

events.name: Ready
events.description: Sent immediately on SSE connection. Contains active intents and subscribed space IDs.

events.name: Resumed
events.description: Sent after replaying missed events on reconnection via Last-Event-ID.

events.name: SelectInteraction
events.description: A user submitted a selection from a select menu on a message.

events.name: TypingStart
events.description: A user or bot started typing in a channel.

events.name: TypingStop
events.description: A user or bot stopped typing in a channel.

events.name: VoiceJoin
events.description: A user joined a voice channel.

events.name: VoiceLeave
events.description: A user left a voice channel.
